meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Project Management to Solve Deployment Blocks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Master project management workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your student projects with professional confidence.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is rarely a technical bug; it is a project management failure. By structuring your application with modular architecture and automated CI/CD pipelines via Claude Code, you eliminate environmental drift. Use this checklist to map your dependencies, containerize your logic, and deploy with professional-grade precision every time.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding, perfecting your logic, and iterating on your AI features. But when you hit the 'Deploy' button, the screen flashes red. The environment breaks, dependencies collide, and your vision stalls. This isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of structure. You are experiencing the classic 'deployment wall' that separates hobbyists from professional AI engineers.

The secret isn't more code—it's better management. By treating your deployment as a project lifecycle rather than a final step, you transform chaos into a predictable, repeatable process. Let's bridge the gap between your local environment and the cloud.

steps.title: Define Environment Manifests
steps.description: Standardize your runtime requirements to ensure the cloud matches your local machine exactly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project dependencies and generate a production-ready Dockerfile and .env.example file that minimizes attack surface and ensures cross-platform compatibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate docker-compose and environment manifest templates'

steps.title: Modularize Your Core Logic
steps.description: Decouple your AI logic from your UI to prevent monolithic deployment failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my current codebase to separate the core AI processing logic into a standalone service module with defined API interfaces.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor into modular service architecture'

steps.title: Automate Build Validation
steps.description: Create a pre-flight check that validates your code before the deployment script executes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a pre-deployment script that checks for missing environment variables, linting errors, and broken test suites.

steps.title: Configure Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: Move away from manual console clicking toward repeatable infrastructure deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an infrastructure-as-code template for my current project stack to ensure identical production and staging environments.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate IaC configuration for target cloud provider'

steps.title: Establish Observability Metrics
steps.description: Implement logging so you know exactly why a deployment might fail in the future.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate lightweight logging and error tracking into my primary entry point to capture deployment-time failures.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add structured logging and error reporting'

pro_tips: Always use a .dockerignore file to prevent local artifacts from bloating your cloud container.
Treat your deployment script as a living document; update it every time you add a new dependency.
Implement 'Blue-Green' deployment logic even on a small scale to ensure zero-downtime updates.
Keep your secrets in a vault service rather than hardcoding them; use environment variables exclusively.
Run your deployment script in a 'dry-run' mode locally before ever hitting the production cloud.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully deployed your project, document your architecture in a README.md file and share it with your peers to build your portfolio credibility.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting deployment anxiety hold your vision back. By mastering these project management workflows, you gain the skills that companies actually hire for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
